requiredControls: strict JSON schema and exit-code parsing
offline versioned OSV database snapshot for reproducible CI
no package build or dependency installation
candidates.rationale: Official OSV frontend with permissive license and structured output; adoption waits for a reproducible offline advisory snapshot design.
Mature Shell analysis is valuable, but GPLv3 distribution obligations require an explicit product decision before bundling or installing.

requiredControls: metrics off and version check disabled
no login, cloud, Pro, MCP, autofix or untrusted validators
no local builds or reviewed dependency execution
LGPL distribution and subprocess boundary review
candidates.rationale: Cross-language parsing and taint rules could close major gaps, but default network/metrics and execution-capable flags conflict with Verity unless a deny-by-construction wrapper and license boundary are proven.

requiredControls: evaluate successor or complementary detector before claiming broader secret coverage
keep raw secrets redacted before Verity adapters
candidates.rationale: Existing integration remains useful and controlled, but upstream says feature development has ended; future breadth must not depend on it alone.
